calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Andrew Chew, Esq. & Kyoko Wyse, Esq. for Plaintiff F. Lee Lawrence, who was not present.
Order re: waiver of appearance by witness filed - 09/07/07.
Default entered against Defendant Kentile Floors, Inc. - 06/15/07.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Kentile Floors, Inc. as follows:
Damages/Principal $882.16
Costs $308.30, for a total of $1,190.46.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Continued To Feb-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case

MEI LIN HOM, ESQ. OF BRAYTON PURCELL, LLP, (415)898-1555, FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, F LEE LAWRENCE
NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE

THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF F LEE LAWRENCE'S Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case IS GRANTED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: John K. Stewart, Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR # 11055
